title: haplopappus viscidus
intro: Haplopappus viscidus, also known as sticky gilia or sticky gilia flower, is a plant species native to North America. The plant is used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Haplopappus viscidus include relief from colds, coughs, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as a treatment for skin conditions and wounds. Herbal preparations of Haplopappus viscidus can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures to leverage its medicinal properties.
